# @bghcore/dynamic-forms-core

> UI-library agnostic React library for rendering configuration-driven forms with a built-in business rules engine. Depends only on React and react-hook-form.

- Docs: [README](https://github.com/bghcore/dynamic-react-business-forms/tree/main/packages/core/README.md)
- Agent instructions: [AGENTS.md](https://github.com/bghcore/dynamic-react-business-forms/tree/main/packages/core/AGENTS.md)
- npm: [@bghcore/dynamic-forms-core](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@bghcore/dynamic-forms-core)
- License: MIT

## API Surface

### Providers
- `BusinessRulesProvider` -- React context provider owning business rules state via useReducer
- `UseBusinessRulesContext` -- Hook to access business rules state
- `InjectedHookFieldProvider` -- Component injection registry provider
- `UseInjectedHookFieldContext` -- Hook to access injected field registry

### Components
- `HookInlineForm` -- Main form component (react-hook-form, auto-save with AbortController/retry/timeout, business rules orchestration). Props include `saveTimeoutMs` (default 30s), `maxSaveRetries` (default 3), `formErrors` (form-level error banner)
- `HookInlineFormFields` -- Ordered field list rendering
- `HookRenderField` -- Per-field routing with Controller integration (useMemo, async validation wired with AbortController)
- `HookFieldWrapper` -- Field chrome (label, error, status) using plain HTML. Render props: `renderLabel`, `renderError`, `renderStatus` for theming customization
- `HookConfirmInputsModal` -- Confirmation dialog using native `<dialog>` with focus trap (Tab wraps, Escape closes, focus restored)
- `HookFormErrorBoundary` -- Per-field error boundary. Props: `children`, `fallback` (render function receiving error + reset), `onError` callback. Each field is wrapped automatically in the rendering pipeline
- `HookFormDevTools` -- Collapsible dev-only panel showing business rules, form values, errors, dependency graph. Props: `configName`, `configRules`, `formValues`, `formErrors`, `dirtyFields`, `enabled`

### Wizard
- `HookWizardForm` -- Multi-step wizard form component with step navigation
- `getVisibleSteps()` -- Filter wizard steps by visibility conditions
- `getStepFields()` -- Get visible fields for a step (respects business rule hidden state)
- `getStepFieldOrder()` -- Get flat field order across all visible steps
- `validateStepFields()` -- Get fields with validation errors in a step
- `isStepValid()` -- Check if a step has no validation errors
- `getStepIndex()` -- Find step index by ID

### Field Arrays
- `HookFieldArray` -- Repeatable field group component (add/remove/reorder items)

### Business Rules Helpers
- `ProcessAllBusinessRules()` -- Full initialization: field configs + entity data -> dependency graph + initial rule state
- `ProcessFieldBusinessRule()` -- Evaluate rules for a single field on value change
- `ProcessPreviousFieldBusinessRule()` -- Re-evaluate a field that was previously processed
- `RevertFieldBusinessRule()` -- Revert previously applied rules for a field
- `ProcessComboFieldBusinessRule()` -- Process AND-combination multi-field conditions
- `ProcessDropdownOptions()` -- Process dropdown option filtering dependencies
- `ProcessFieldDropdownValues()` -- Resolve dropdown values from dependencies
- `ProcessFieldOrderDepencendies()` -- Process field ordering dependencies
- `CombineBusinessRules()` -- Merge two business rule states
- `GetFieldValue()` -- Get the current value for a field from entity data
- `SameFieldOrder()` -- Compare two field orderings for equality
- `GetDefaultBusinessRules()` -- Build default business rule state from field configs
- `normalizeFieldConfig()` -- Normalize deprecated `isReadonly` to `readOnly`

### Form Helpers
- `GetChildEntity()` -- Extract child entity from parent
- `IsExpandVisible()` -- Check if expand/collapse should be shown
- `GetConfirmInputModalProps()` -- Build confirm modal props from dirty fields
- `GetValueFunctionsOnDirtyFields()` -- Get value functions to run for dirty fields
- `GetValueFunctionsOnCreate()` -- Get value functions to run on entity creation
- `ExecuteValueFunction()` -- Execute a single value function
- `CheckFieldValidationRules()` -- Run sync validation rules for a field
- `CheckAsyncFieldValidationRules()` -- Run async validation rules for a field
- `CheckValidDropdownOptions()` -- Validate dropdown option integrity
- `CheckDeprecatedDropdownOptions()` -- Handle deprecated dropdown values
- `CheckDefaultValues()` -- Apply default values from field configs
- `CheckIsDeprecated()` -- Check if a field value is deprecated
- `InitOnCreateBusinessRules()` -- Initialize business rules for new entity creation
- `InitOnEditBusinessRules()` -- Initialize business rules for existing entity editing
- `ShowField()` -- Determine if a field should be rendered
- `CombineSchemaConfig()` -- Merge JSON schema with field configs
- `GetFieldsToRender()` -- Get ordered list of fields to render

### Validation Registry
- `registerValidations()` -- Register custom sync validation functions
- `getValidation()` -- Look up a validation by name
- `getValidationRegistry()` -- Get all registered sync validations
- `registerAsyncValidations()` -- Register custom async validation functions
- `getAsyncValidation()` -- Look up an async validation by name
- `getAsyncValidationRegistry()` -- Get all registered async validations
- `createMinLengthValidation()` -- Factory for min-length validator
- `createMaxLengthValidation()` -- Factory for max-length validator
- `createNumericRangeValidation()` -- Factory for numeric range validator
- `createPatternValidation()` -- Factory for regex pattern validator
- `createRequiredIfValidation()` -- Factory for conditional required validator

### Value Function Registry
- `registerValueFunctions()` -- Register custom value functions
- `getValueFunction()` -- Look up a value function by name
- `executeValueFunction()` -- Execute a value function by name

### Config Validation
- `validateFieldConfigs()` -- Validate field configs for missing dependencies, unregistered components, circular deps

### Cycle Detection
- `detectDependencyCycles()` -- Detect circular dependencies using Kahn's algorithm
- `detectOrderDependencyCycles()` -- Detect circular order dependencies
- `validateDependencyGraph()` -- Full dependency graph validation with dev-mode warnings

### i18n / Locale
- `registerLocale()` -- Register partial or full locale string overrides (merges with defaults)
- `getLocaleString()` -- Get a locale string by key
- `resetLocale()` -- Reset to English defaults
- `getCurrentLocale()` -- Get the full current locale object

### Field Helpers
- `SortDropdownOptions()` -- Sort dropdown options alphabetically

### Constants
- `HookInlineFormConstants` -- Form constants (expand cutoff, shimmer config, panel actions, regex patterns)
- `ComponentTypes` -- Component type string keys (Textbox, Dropdown, Toggle, Number, etc.)
- `FIELD_PARENT_PREFIX` -- Prefix for parent field references ("Parent.")
- `HookInlineFormStrings` -- Default English string literals

### Types
- `IFieldConfig` -- Primary consumer-facing type defining field configuration shape
- `IHookFieldSharedProps<T>` -- Props contract all injected field components receive
- `IHookInlineFormSharedProps` -- Shared form props (entity IDs, program name, config name, etc.)
- `IBusinessRule` -- Runtime business rule state per field
- `IBusinessRulesState` -- Top-level rules state container
- `IConfigBusinessRules` -- Rules for a single form config
- `IBusinessRuleAction` -- Reducer action types
- `IBusinessRuleActionKeys` -- Action type enum
- `IConfirmInputModalProps` -- Confirm modal state
- `IExecuteValueFunction` -- Value function execution DTO
- `IFieldToRender` -- Field render instruction
- `IDropdownOption` -- Dropdown option type (`{ key, text }`)
- `IHookPerson` -- Person data model
- `IOrderDependencies` / `OrderDependencyMap` -- Order dependency types
- `ILocaleStrings` / `ICoreLocaleStrings` -- Localizable string keys
- `IWizardConfig` / `IWizardStep` / `IWizardStepCondition` -- Wizard configuration types
- `IFieldArrayConfig` -- Field array configuration type
- `IDependencyAndRules` -- Combo dependency rule type
- `IDeprecatedOption` -- Deprecated dropdown option type
- `ICycleError` -- Cycle detection error type
- `IConfigValidationError` -- Config validation error type
- `ValidationFunction` / `AsyncValidationFunction` -- Validation function signatures
- `ValueFunction` -- Value function signature
- `IBusinessRulesProvider` -- Business rules provider interface
- `IInjectedHookFieldProvider` -- Injected field provider interface
- `IHookFormDevToolsProps` -- DevTools component props
- `IDraftPersistenceOptions` -- useDraftPersistence options
- `IDraftState` -- Stored draft state shape
- `IUseDraftPersistenceResult` -- useDraftPersistence return type
- `IJsonSchema` -- JSON Schema root type for jsonSchemaToFieldConfig
- `IJsonSchemaProperty` -- JSON Schema property type

### Hooks
- `useDraftPersistence(options)` -- Auto-save form state to localStorage on interval, recover draft on mount, clear after server save. Options: `formId` (string), `data` (form values), `saveIntervalMs` (number), `enabled` (boolean), `storageKeyPrefix` (string). Returns: `{ hasDraft, draftData, clearDraft, lastSavedAt }`
- `useBeforeUnload(shouldWarn, message?)` -- Browser warning on page leave with unsaved changes

### Form State Serialization
- `serializeFormState(data)` -- Date-safe JSON serialization (converts Date objects to tagged strings)
- `deserializeFormState(json)` -- Deserialize back, restoring Date objects from tagged strings

### JSON Schema Import
- `jsonSchemaToFieldConfig(schema)` -- Convert JSON Schema to `Dictionary<IFieldConfig>`. Maps `type` to component, `enum` to dropdown options, `format` to validations, `required` to field required flag

### Lazy Field Registry
- `createLazyFieldRegistry(imports)` -- Create a field registry using `React.lazy()` for on-demand component loading. Accepts `Record<string, () => Promise<{ default: ComponentType }>>`, returns `Dictionary<JSX.Element>`

### Utilities
- `Dictionary<T>` -- Generic dictionary type alias (`Record<string, T>`)
- `IEntityData` -- Entity data type alias (`Record<string, unknown>`)
- `SubEntityType` -- Sub-entity value union type
- `isEmpty()` / `isNull()` / `isStringEmpty()` -- Null/empty check utilities
- `deepCopy()` -- Deep clone via `structuredClone`
- `getDropdownValue()` / `setDropdownValue()` / `buildDropdownOption()` -- Dropdown option utilities
- `convertBooleanToYesOrNoText()` -- Boolean to "Yes"/"No" text
- `sortDropdownOptions()` -- Sort dropdown options comparator

## Code Examples

### Minimal Setup

```tsx
import {
  BusinessRulesProvider,
  InjectedHookFieldProvider,
  HookInlineForm,
  IFieldConfig,
  Dictionary,
} from "@bghcore/dynamic-forms-core";
import { createFluentFieldRegistry } from "@bghcore/dynamic-forms-fluent";

const fieldConfigs: Dictionary<IFieldConfig> = {
  title: { component: "Textbox", required: true, label: "Title" },
  status: {
    component: "Dropdown",
    label: "Status",
    dropdownOptions: [
      { key: "draft", text: "Draft" },
      { key: "active", text: "Active" },
    ],
  },
};

const fieldOrder = ["title", "status"];

function MyForm() {
  return (
    <BusinessRulesProvider>
      <InjectedHookFieldProvider injectedFields={createFluentFieldRegistry()}>
        <HookInlineForm
          programName="myApp"
          configName="myForm"
          fieldConfigs={fieldConfigs}
          fieldOrder={fieldOrder}
          entityData={{ title: "Hello", status: "draft" }}
          onSave={(data) => console.log("Saved:", data)}
        />
      </InjectedHookFieldProvider>
    </BusinessRulesProvider>
  );
}
```

### Business Rules (Dependencies)

```tsx
const fieldConfigs: Dictionary<IFieldConfig> = {
  country: {
    component: "Dropdown",
    label: "Country",
    dropdownOptions: [
      { key: "US", text: "United States" },
      { key: "CA", text: "Canada" },
    ],
    // When country = "US", make state required and visible
    dependencies: {
      US: { state: { required: true, hidden: false } },
      CA: { state: { required: false, hidden: true } },
    },
  },
  state: {
    component: "Textbox",
    label: "State",
    hidden: true, // hidden by default until country dependency fires
  },
};
```

### Async Validation

```tsx
import { registerAsyncValidations } from "@bghcore/dynamic-forms-core";

registerAsyncValidations({
  uniqueUsername: async (value, entityData, signal) => {
    const response = await fetch(`/api/check-username?name=${value}`, { signal });
    const result = await response.json();
    return result.taken ? "Username is already taken" : undefined;
  },
});

const fieldConfigs: Dictionary<IFieldConfig> = {
  username: {
    component: "Textbox",
    label: "Username",
    asyncValidations: ["uniqueUsername"],
    asyncValidationDebounceMs: 500,
  },
};
```

### i18n / Localization

```tsx
import { registerLocale } from "@bghcore/dynamic-forms-core";

registerLocale({
  saving: "Enregistrement...",
  required: "Obligatoire",
  saveError: "Erreur lors de l'enregistrement",
  thisFieldIsRequired: "Ce champ est obligatoire",
  mustBeAtLeastChars: (min) => `Doit comporter au moins ${min} caracteres`,
});
```

### Wizard Form

```tsx
import {
  HookWizardForm,
  IWizardConfig,
} from "@bghcore/dynamic-forms-core";

const wizardConfig: IWizardConfig = {
  steps: [
    { id: "basics", title: "Basics", fields: ["title", "description"] },
    { id: "details", title: "Details", fields: ["status", "priority"] },
    {
      id: "advanced",
      title: "Advanced",
      fields: ["tags"],
      visibleWhen: { fieldName: "priority", values: ["high", "critical"] },
    },
  ],
  validateOnStepChange: true,
};

<HookWizardForm
  wizardConfig={wizardConfig}
  entityData={entityData}
  fieldRules={fieldRules}
  errors={errors}
  renderStepContent={(fields) => <HookInlineFormFields fields={fields} />}
  renderStepNavigation={({ goNext, goPrev, canGoNext, canGoPrev }) => (
    <div>
      <button disabled={!canGoPrev} onClick={goPrev}>Back</button>
      <button disabled={!canGoNext} onClick={goNext}>Next</button>
    </div>
  )}
/>
```

### Field Arrays

```tsx
import { HookFieldArray, IFieldArrayConfig } from "@bghcore/dynamic-forms-core";

const lineItemConfig: IFieldArrayConfig = {
  itemFields: {
    description: { component: "Textbox", label: "Description", required: true },
    quantity: { component: "Number", label: "Qty" },
  },
  minItems: 1,
  maxItems: 10,
  defaultItem: { description: "", quantity: 1 },
  reorderable: true,
};

<HookFieldArray
  fieldName="lineItems"
  config={lineItemConfig}
  renderItem={(itemFieldNames, index, remove) => (
    <div>
      {/* render fields for itemFieldNames[0], itemFieldNames[1], etc. */}
      <button onClick={remove}>Remove</button>
    </div>
  )}
  renderAddButton={(append, canAdd) => (
    <button disabled={!canAdd} onClick={append}>Add Item</button>
  )}
/>
```

### Error Boundary

```tsx
import { HookFormErrorBoundary } from "@bghcore/dynamic-forms-core";

<HookFormErrorBoundary
  fallback={(error, resetErrorBoundary) => (
    <div>
      <p>Field crashed: {error.message}</p>
      <button onClick={resetErrorBoundary}>Retry</button>
    </div>
  )}
  onError={(error, errorInfo) => logError(error)}
>
  <MyFieldComponent />
</HookFormErrorBoundary>
```

### Draft Persistence

```tsx
import {
  useDraftPersistence,
  useBeforeUnload,
  serializeFormState,
  deserializeFormState,
} from "@bghcore/dynamic-forms-core";

function MyForm() {
  const { hasDraft, draftData, clearDraft } = useDraftPersistence({
    formId: "order-form-123",
    data: formValues,
    saveIntervalMs: 5000,
    enabled: isDirty,
    storageKeyPrefix: "myApp",
  });

  useBeforeUnload(isDirty, "You have unsaved changes.");

  // Manual serialization for custom storage
  const serialized = serializeFormState(formValues);    // Date-safe JSON string
  const restored = deserializeFormState(serialized);     // Dates restored
}
```

### DevTools

```tsx
import { HookFormDevTools } from "@bghcore/dynamic-forms-core";

<HookFormDevTools
  configName="orderForm"
  configRules={businessRules}
  formValues={watch()}
  formErrors={errors}
  dirtyFields={dirtyFields}
  enabled={process.env.NODE_ENV === "development"}
/>
```

### JSON Schema Import

```tsx
import { jsonSchemaToFieldConfig } from "@bghcore/dynamic-forms-core";

const fieldConfigs = jsonSchemaToFieldConfig({
  type: "object",
  properties: {
    name: { type: "string", minLength: 1 },
    age: { type: "number", minimum: 0, maximum: 150 },
    role: { type: "string", enum: ["admin", "user", "guest"] },
    email: { type: "string", format: "email" },
  },
  required: ["name", "email"],
});
// Maps: string->Textbox, number->Number, enum->Dropdown, format:email->EmailValidation
```

### Lazy Field Registry

```tsx
import { createLazyFieldRegistry } from "@bghcore/dynamic-forms-core";

const lazyFields = createLazyFieldRegistry({
  Textbox: () => import("./fields/HookTextbox"),
  Dropdown: () => import("./fields/HookDropdown"),
  DateControl: () => import("./fields/HookDateControl"),
});

setInjectedFields(lazyFields);
```
